name: _ActionRunResponseError
description: The error information returned from a third party when running an action.

code.description:
Error type of the result object.

* `user` - user
* `authentication` - authentication
* `partner` - partner
* `system` - system
* `throttled` - throttled
* `system_throttled` - system_throttled
* `hydration` - hydration

title.description: A short summary of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

delay.description: When a partner throttled the execution call (error_type = throttled), this value will hold the number of seconds to wait before retrying.

meta.description: Any additional error information returned from the partner.
